profile.name: Rod Allen
profile.targetRole: Enterprise Solutions Architect, Revenue Operations Leader, Head of Marketing Operations

applications.jobDescription:
Lead enterprise GTM integration architecture for Fortune 500 and high-growth technology customers.

- Design scalable Workato recipes connecting Salesforce, Marketo, Adobe Workfront, and adjacent revenue systems
- Partner with sales engineering and customer success on complex multi-system deployments
- Translate RevOps and Marketing Ops requirements into production-grade automation patterns
- Advise customers on data governance, lead lifecycle design, and executive reporting architecture
- Support pre-sales technical discovery and proof-of-concept builds for enterprise accounts

Ideal background: deep Salesforce + Marketo experience, hands-on Workato delivery, and global GTM operations leadership.
applications.notes:
Strong fit: Rod architects Workato-based GTM ecosystems today at MERGE and scaled global marketing ops at Neo4j.

Search: "Principal Solutions Architect" Workato enterprise site:greenhouse.io OR site:workato.com/careers

applications.jobDescription:
Own revenue operations strategy and systems for a high-growth B2B SaaS revenue platform company.

- Build forecast hygiene, pipeline analytics, and executive visibility across sales and marketing
- Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Finance on territory design, funnel definitions, and lifecycle reporting
- Administer and optimize Salesforce architecture supporting global revenue teams
- Drive cross-functional GTM process improvements from lead capture through closed-won
- Establish data governance standards and self-serve analytics for revenue leaders

Ideal background: 10+ years RevOps leadership, Salesforce power user, and experience scaling ops through hypergrowth.
applications.notes:
Strong fit: Rod built inaugural revenue models, SFDC reporting, and full-funnel lifecycle programs at MariaDB and Neo4j.

Search: "Director Revenue Operations" Clari remote site:greenhouse.io

applications.jobDescription:
Guide enterprise customers implementing and optimizing Adobe Marketo Engage within complex GTM stacks.

- Lead technical discovery and solution design for enterprise marketing automation programs
- Architect lead routing, scoring, nurture, and attribution models across Salesforce and Marketo
- Support global marketing operations teams on program execution, data quality, and reporting
- Deliver best-practice recommendations for scalable marketing ops in regulated and high-volume environments
- Collaborate with professional services and customer success on multi-region rollouts

Ideal background: Marketo Certified Expert, enterprise marketing ops leadership, and Salesforce integration experience.
applications.notes:
Strong fit: Marketo Certified Expert with Neo4j/MariaDB global marketing ops leadership and SFDC integration depth.

Search: "Marketo Engage" "Solutions Consultant" Adobe remote site:adobe.com/careers
